sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92284" key="r(ekth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥεκ-τήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92284.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">active, busy</tr_>, Ion Hist.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
